title: agrostistachys longifolia var. leptostachya
intro: Agrostistachys longifolia var. leptostachya, also known as Indian spikenard, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Burseraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Indian spikenard include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. Indian spikenard can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
